question: What is the main function of the device recently discovered in desert ruins?

answers.original:
The main function of the Chrono-Regulator, recently discovered in the Desert Ruins, is to stabilize localized temporal distortions and prevent chaotic time anomalies.

### References

- [1] The Chrono-Regulator is an ancient technological device discovered in desert ruins, designed to stabilize localized temporal distortions and prevent chaotic time anomalies.

entities.name: Desert Ruins
entities.description: The Desert Ruins are the site where the Chrono-Regulator was discovered, belonging to a forgotten civilization.<SEP>The Desert Ruins are the site where the Chrono-Regulator was recently discovered.

entities.name: Chrono-Regulator
entities.description: The Chrono-Regulator is an ancient technological device discovered in desert ruins, designed to stabilize localized temporal distortions.<SEP>The Chrono-Regulator is an ancient technological device discovered in desert ruins, designed to stabilize localized temporal distortions and prevent chaotic time anomalies.

entities.name: Forgotten Civilization
entities.description: The Forgotten Civilization is the group that created the Chrono-Regulator and the desert ruins.

entities.name: Hourglass Sandstone
entities.description: Hourglass Sandstone is a material used to make time-keeping amulets worn by Chrono-Weavers.

entities.name: Xylotian Chrono-Weaver
entities.description: Xylotian Chrono-Weavers are individuals trained to perceive echoes of past events and create temporal distortions.

relations.description: The Chrono-Regulator was discovered in the Desert Ruins.<SEP>The Chrono-Regulator was discovered in the Desert Ruins.
The Chrono-Regulator was created by the Forgotten Civilization.
Chrono-Weavers wear amulets made of Hourglass Sandstone to keep time.
